title: 9 Herbal Teas for Teenagers with Ovulation Pain
description: Angelica sinensis tinctures have been traditionally used to help alleviate ovulation pain, also known as mittelschmerz. This pain occurs when an egg is released from the ovary during ovulation. The tincture contains compounds like ferulic acid, sinensetin, and ligustilide, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. These properties help to relax the uterine muscles and reduce inflammation in the reproductive organs, thereby easing the pain associated with...
